backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a marketplace with product listings, transactions, user profiles, and admin revenue tracking. Includes authorization mixins, blob storage for images, and functions for creating/querying listings and processing transactions with 10% commission.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping five main features (marketplace platform, authentication, product listings, payment processing, revenue dashboard) to their implementing files, components, and test IDs with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files describing components, pages, hooks, and their functionality in the marketplace application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script loading main.tsx, titled 'Revenue Marketplace'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for browsing, listing details, seller dashboard, create/edit listing, transactions, and revenue dashboard. Includes theme provider, protected routes, and profile setup modal logic.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying shield alert icon and appropriate message for unauthenticated or unauthorized users, with login button or homepage navigation.
frontend/src/components/DeleteListingBut: Delete listing button with confirmation alert dialog that shows a toast error indicating delete functionality is not available in the backend.
frontend/src/components/IconDisplay.tsx: Simple component rendering the transaction icon image from generated assets with configurable className prop.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header navigation, user authentication menu, and responsive mobile/desktop navigation. Includes links to browse, seller dashboard, transactions, and admin revenue dashboard based on user permissions.
frontend/src/components/ListingCard.tsx: Displays a product listing as a card with image, title, category badge, description, and price. Links to the detailed listing page with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that handles login/logout with Internet Identity, showing loading states and clearing query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MetricCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying metrics with an icon, label, value, optional trend, and customizable accent colors (gold or emerald).
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name for profile creation, blocking interaction until completed.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route wrapper that checks authentication and optionally admin status, showing access denied screen if requirements aren't met.
frontend/src/components/PurchaseButton.t: Button with confirmation dialog for purchasing listings, handles transaction creation with 10% commission calculation and navigates to success/failure pages.
frontend/src/components/RevenueChart.tsx: Line chart component that visualizes revenue trends over time by aggregating transaction commissions by date using Recharts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with proper identity handling, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating product listings, transactions, and admin data using the backend actor, including getAllListings, createListing, createTransaction, and getTotalCommission.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the current user's profile using the backend actor, with proper loading states and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including marketplace-specific gold and emerald color utilities.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions including cn() for merging Tailwind classes and formatPrice() for converting bigint prices to USD currency strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/BrowseListings.tsx: Main marketplace page displaying a hero section, search/filter controls, and a grid of product listings with loading skeletons and category filtering.
frontend/src/pages/CreateListing.tsx: Form page for creating new product listings with title, description, price, category, and image upload with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/EditListing.tsx: Placeholder page for editing listings that displays an alert indicating the backend does not support update operations.
frontend/src/pages/ListingDetails.tsx: Detailed view of a single product listing showing image, description, price, seller info, and purchase/edit actions based on ownership.
frontend/src/pages/RevenueDashboard.tsx: Displays platform revenue metrics including total commission, transaction count, active users, and growth rate with a chart and recent transactions table. Uses custom hooks to fetch commission and transaction data from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDashboard.tsx: Shows a seller's own listings filtered by their identity principal, with stats, edit/delete controls, and a button to create new listings. Displays an empty state when no listings exist.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionFailure.ts: Simple error page shown when a transaction fails, offering buttons to return to browse or retry the previous action.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistory.ts: Displays all transactions for the current user, showing whether each was a purchase or sale, counterparty principal, amount, and commission in a table format.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionSuccess.ts: Success confirmation page shown after a completed purchase, with buttons to view transaction history or continue shopping.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (using OKLCH), theme extensions, animations, and design tokens for the application's styling system.
project_state.json: Project configuration for a marketplace platform connecting buyers and sellers with authentication, product listings, payment processing, and revenue tracking. Features a dark theme with gold/emerald accents and targets $100k revenue generation.
